title: dasyglossum distans
intro: Dasyglossum distans, also known as Chinese club moss or Lycopodiopsida, is a type of ancient plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-cancer activities. The health benefits of Dasyglossum distans include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially treating various types of cancer. Dasyglossum distans can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
